title: Zorbit Privilege
description: Schema for privileges with extended navigation fields. Each privilege represents a menu item with frontend and backend route configurations using handlebars templates.

id.description: Unique privilege identifier using short hash format.

privilege_label.description: Human-readable display label for the privilege.

section_id.description: Foreign key to the privilege section this privilege belongs to.

fe_route_config.description: Frontend route path template using handlebars syntax. Variables like {{org_id}} and {{user_id}} are resolved at runtime.

be_route_config.description: Backend API route template using handlebars syntax. Resolved at runtime for service-to-service calls.

icon.description: Material Icon name for the menu item.

visible_in_menu.description: Controls whether this privilege appears as a visible menu item. Some privileges are backend-only and should not render in the menu.

seq_number.description: Display order of the privilege within its section. Lower numbers appear first.

actions.description: Available actions associated with this privilege.

privilege.description: Privilege code required to perform this action.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the privilege was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.
